queries.feature_definition: Credit amount requested by the applicant.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the statistical impact of the requested credit amount on credit default probability and its role as a primary determinant of default.
Investigation into the statistical impact of loan duration in months on credit default probability and its classification as a key credit risk driver.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Assessment of the statistical impact of the absence of a checking account on credit default probability and its role as a significant determinant of default.
